cluster_name.description: Name of the ECS cluster to manage capacity providers for.

capacity_providers.description: Set of names of one or more capacity providers to associate with the cluster. Valid values also include `FARGATE` and `FARGATE_SPOT`.

default_capacity_provider_strategy.type: list(object({capacity_provider: string, weight: number, base: number}))
default_capacity_provider_strategy.description: Set of capacity provider strategies to use by default for the cluster.
